CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-05-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order Re: Defendants Requests For Admission, Set Two And Three
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Dewitt, Esq. 415-459-7300 of Brady Law Group for Plaintiff PATRICIA SMITH.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PATRICIA SMITH's Motion For A Protective Order Re: Defendants Requests For Admission, Set Two And Three.

Plaintiff's motion for protective order is GRANTED; plaintiff need answer no further requests for admission. Plaintiff has already responded to 78 requests for admission in this trip-and-fall premises liability case, but defendants demand answers to 317 more. The limit on requests for admission is 35; more are allowed only if the case is complex or has a large quantity of issues, but neither is so here. (See CCP 2033.030, 2033.040.) If defendants believe plaintiff's discovery excessive, they too can move for a protective order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order Re: Defendants Requests For Admission, Set Two And Three
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Continued To Mar-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica DeWitt, Esq. of Brady Law Group, T:800.881.9011, for plaintiff and moving party;
Robert J. Frassetto, Esq. of Frassetto Law LLP, T:510.817.0466, for defendant.

Defendant's counsel did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF PATRICIA SMITH's Motion For A Protective Order Re: Defendant's Requests For Admission, Set Two And Three is continued to March 5, 2018 at 9:30 am in Department 302. The Judge Pro Tem shall prepare her Report and Recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
